content.problemStatement:
In this module, we will build a simple Photo Gallery Website using Flask.  
First, you will see a demonstration of the final application. Then in each lesson, we will implement one piece of functionality at a time until the full project is complete.

Click the Run button to start the Flask development server and explore the application in your browser.

### Overview of the application:

    Home page: A welcome message and brief introduction.  
    Gallery page: Displays thumbnails of all photos stored in static/images/.  
    Photo detail page: Shows a full-size image and its caption using dynamic routing.  
    API endpoint: Returns a JSON list of photo filenames and captions.  
    About page: A brief description of the gallery application.  

### Step-wise breakdown of the project.

1. Basic API endpoints to show endpoints.
2. Connect the back-end with the front-end using jinja2 template.
3. Dynamically show the Photo gallery's photos from static folder.
